channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][CAST][公开] Anime News Network Jaadugar: A Witch Mongolia 动画 公开 English Dub 声优阵容, July 18 Debut
item.description: Cristina Vee, Marwa Elda, Abi Kumar, Yussef Benelbar, more star in 1st 2 dubbed episodes on Saturday ― Crunchyroll revealed on Friday that it will begin streaming the first two English-dubbed... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Jaadugar: A Witch in Mongolia Anime Reveals English Dub Cast, July 18 Debut

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network CUTIE STREET Members Guest Star as Pikachu Idol Group Pokémon Horizons 动画
item.description: CUTIE STREET also perform anime's current ending theme song ― The staff of the Pokémon Horizons anime announced on Friday that CUTIE STREET, who perform the current ending theme song "Cute na... | 来源: ANN | 原文: CUTIE STREET Members Guest Star as Pikachu Idol Group in Pokémon Horizons Anime

item.title: [续作] Anime News Network Let的 Play Webcomic的 季度 4 Sets July 22 Return on Tapas
item.description: Pre-launch episode is available on Tapas now ahead of full Season 4 debut ― Rocketship Entertainment announced on Thursday that Leeanne M. Krecic's (aka Mongie) Let's Play webcomic will officially... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Let's Play Webcomic's Season 4 Sets July 22 Return on Tapas

item.title: [动画][PV][STAFF][公开] Anime News Network Im Dating a Dark Summoner Anime的 预告 Video 公开 More 制作阵容
item.description: Anime premieres in October, with HIDIVE streaming ― The official website for the short anime of Shaoh's I'm Dating a Dark Summoner (Dark Summoner to Dekiteiru) manga began streaming a teaser trailer... | 来源: ANN | 原文: I'm Dating a Dark Summoner Anime's Teaser Video Reveals More Staff

item.title: [CAST] MyAnimeList 追加 声优阵容 Pair Junket Bank Announced

item.title: [CAST][STAFF][开播][发表] MyAnimeList Ma no Mono-tachi wa Kuwadateru 宣布 Main 声优阵容, 追加 制作阵容, 2027 开播
